records.raw:
[
  {"op":"new_sketch","plane":"XY"},
  {"op":"add_rectangle","sketch":"sk1","x":0,"y":0,"w":70,"h":70},
  {"op":"extrude","sketch":"sk1","distance":8},
  {"op":"hole","face_or_sketch":"solid","x":35,"y":35,"diameter":25,"through":true},
  {"op":"new_sketch","plane":"XY"},
  {"op":"add_circle","sketch":"sk2","cx":0,"cy":0,"r":6.5},
  {"op":"translate","sketch":"sk2","x":10,"y":10},
  {"op":"extrude","sketch":"sk2","distance":6},
  {"op":"new_sketch","plane":"XY"},
  {"op":"add_circle","sketch":"sk3","cx":0,"cy":0,"r":3.5},
  {"op":"translate","sketch":"sk3","x":10,"y":(70-6)/2},
  {"op":"extrude","sketch":"sk3","distance":6}
]

This design brief includes four 6mm bolt holes, one in each corner of the square flange plate. To accommodate this, I added an additional operation to create and extrude a smaller circle (sketch sk3) for the inner part of each corner hole. The y-coordinate of the translation is calculated as the average height of the 70mm square (70/2 - 6/2).

]
```
